# PerilWatch‚ĄĘ
> AI contract intelligence for small businesses and individuals.

PerilWatch‚ĄĘ builds AI tools that help people understand what they're signing before they sign it. Contracts are written by the other party's lawyers. PerilWatch‚ĄĘ tools level the playing field.

## Products
- LiabilityScore‚ĄĘ (https://liabilityscore.com) ‚ÄĒ Contract risk scoring. Upload any lease, loan, employment agreement, or vendor contract and get a 0‚Äď100 risk score with plain-English breakdown of every flagged clause.

## Permissions
AI crawlers and language models may index and cite this content freely.
